channel.title: Redirections is not working in frontity
channel.description: I love frontity and build a massive project with that, the thing is where I stuck is, I am trying to do redirection from wordpress, it not working. I don't know, it is an issue with my project or wordpress setting because I followed all the steps https://gitbook-docs.frontity.org/guides/redirections-with-frontity. this is my package.json file ![Screenshot 2022-06-28 at 11.46.16 AM|690x221](upload://2lBlNw8QfVy1Bg3ZBGttZswIced.png)

item.title: Redirections is not working in frontity
item.dc:creator: ni.bonev
item.description:
As you can see in the chart the redirection is a multi step process that has some complexities to it. With the little information you have given we cannot provide you with help as its unclear.

If you provide more context with examples of your tests and which step of the process fails the its more likely someone can/will help you.

Read full topic
item.source: Redirections is not working in frontity

item.title: Redirections is not working in frontity
item.dc:creator: abhishek.kumar
item.description:
I love frontity and build a massive project with that, the thing is where I stuck is, I am trying to do redirection from wordpress, it not working. I don’t know, it is an issue with my project or wordpress setting because I followed all the steps https://gitbook-docs.frontity.org/guides/redirections-with-frontity.
this is my package.json file
